{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Iron guest housing
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Iron guest housing]] is where [[Yerin]] was moved by the [[Winter Sage]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
